caption: In a retail clothing store, a person wearing a light-colored baseball cap and a pink t-shirt stands with their back to the camera. The person is browsing through a rack of black clothing, holding up a black garment to inspect it. Surrounding the individual are various items of apparel on hangers and shelves, including blue garments and packaged accessories. Logos for "O'Neill" and "BN3TR" are visible on the walls and merchandise. Large, white, semi-transparent text is overlaid across the scene, reading "25% OFF HOODIES" on the top line and "JACKETS & SWEATERS" on the second line. As the sequence progresses, the person subtly shifts their position and grip on the black clothing while remaining in the same location, with the on-screen text remaining static throughout the clip.
